conversation.content: make a car that can move with using ASDW keys
make a car that can move with using ASDW keys

steps.description: Create the main chassis of the car as a Part, anchor it, and set its initial properties (size, color, material).
Add four wheel Parts to the car chassis. Ensure they are correctly positioned and oriented relative to the chassis.
Create a Model to group the car chassis and its wheels together, making it a single manageable unit.
Implement a script that handles car movement logic. This script should listen for ASWD key presses from the player.
Connect the car movement script to the player's input, specifically targeting the ASWD keys to control forward, backward, and turning movements of the car.
Add physics constraints (e.g., HingeConstraints or WeldConstraints) to connect the wheels to the car chassis, allowing them to rotate realistically.
Configure the wheel rotation based on player input. The script should apply torque or velocity to the wheel constraints when ASWD keys are pressed.
Place the completed car Model into the Workspace, positioning it at a suitable starting location.
